sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלל

Transliteration: shâlâl

Phonetic: shaw-lawl'

BDB Definition:

  1. prey, plunder, spoil, booty
    1. prey
    2. booty, spoil, plunder (of war)
    3. plunder (private)
    4. gain (meaning dubious)

Origin: from H7997

TWOT entry: 2400a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
